blended.narrative: Hoodoo is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,139 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 6".
